tools.iconBrowseHint: Top picks shown, search for the full icon set

sharing.privateDescription: Only you and explicitly shared members can access this board. A share link does not work in this mode.
sharing.publicDescription: Anyone with the share link can open this board. You can optionally allow anonymous editing.
sharing.sharedDescription: Only explicitly shared ORIM users can access this board. The share link alone is not enough here.
sharing.shareLinkPublicHint: The share link is active because the board visibility is set to "Public".
sharing.shareLinkPrivateHint: This board is currently not reachable through the share link because the visibility is set to "Private". Switch to "Public" if the link should work.
sharing.shareLinkSharedHint: This board is currently not reachable through the share link because the visibility is set to "Shared". Add users below or switch to "Public".
sharing.passwordHint: Password protection only applies to public share links.
sharing.allowEditingHint: This option only applies when visibility is "Public".
sharing.memberAddFailed: The member could not be added.
sharing.memberRemoveFailed: The member could not be removed.
sharing.memberRoleUpdateFailed: The member role could not be updated.
sharing.searchUsersFailed: The user list could not be loaded.
sharing.sharedMembersHint: Use "Shared" when only selected ORIM users should get access.

assistant.emptyState: Describe a diagram and the assistant will create it for you.

admin.themeManagementDescription: Manage the themes available in ORIM, upload or download JSON files, and enable the variants that should be offered to users.
admin.themeUploadReplaceHint: Uploading a theme with the same key replaces an existing editable theme.
admin.themeImmutableHint: The default light theme is protected and cannot be disabled or deleted.
admin.themeDeleteConfirmation: Do you really want to delete the theme "{{name}}"?
admin.themeUploadFailed: The theme could not be uploaded.
admin.themeUpdateFailed: The theme could not be updated.
admin.themeDeleteFailed: The theme could not be deleted.
